title: Italian Sardine Focaccia
description: A simple Italian-inspired recipe featuring sardines on top of a crispy focaccia, perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Slice the focaccia into 1-inch thick slices.
Drizzle the olive oil over the focaccia slices.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Top each focaccia slice with a few sardines.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the sardines.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the focaccia is crispy and golden brown.
